scripts.autoroute: for f in ./$npm_package_config_VERSION/kicad/[!_]*.kicad_pcb; do echo "$f" && python3 ./scripts/autoroute.py "$f" dist/$npm_package_config_VERSION/kicad/freerouting/; done
scripts.build: git submodule update --remote ergogen/footprints/ceoloide ergogen/footprints/infused-kim && npx ergogen ./$npm_package_config_VERSION/ergogen/ --output dist/$npm_package_config_VERSION/ergogen/ && npm run update-pcbs
scripts.copy-traces-from-routed: for f in ./$npm_package_config_VERSION/kicad/routed/[!_]*.kicad_pcb; do echo "$f" && python3 ./$npm_package_config_VERSION/ergogen/kb_ergogen_helper/ergogen_helper.py --no-backup copy-traces "$f" ./$npm_package_config_VERSION/kicad/$(basename "$f"); done
scripts.fab-jlcpcb: for f in ./$npm_package_config_VERSION/kicad/routed/[!_]*.kicad_pcb; do echo "$f" && kikit fab jlcpcb --nametemplate 'splinter_{boardTitle}_{date}' "$f" dist/$npm_package_config_VERSION/kicad/jlcpcb/; done
scripts.update-pcbs: for f in dist/$npm_package_config_VERSION/ergogen/pcbs/[!_]*.kicad_pcb; do echo $f && python3 ./$npm_package_config_VERSION/ergogen/kb_ergogen_helper/ergogen_helper.py --no-backup update-pcb $f; done
scripts.watch-and-copy-pcbs-to-kicad: nodemon --ext .js,.yaml --watch ./$npm_package_config_VERSION/ergogen/config.yaml --exec "npm run build && npm run copy-pcbs-to-kicad"
